train_3968.llm_answer: Consumer advocate: there is no doubt that the government's policies have significantly increased consumer demand for fuel, and as a result of increasing consumer demand, the price of gasoline has risen steadily.

train_316.llm_answer: Statement1: To suit the needs of political clients, advertising agencies have successfully modified a strategy originally developed for corporate campaigns. train_4399.llm_answer: Consumer magazine: because ordinary powder detergent does not dissolve readily in front-loading washers, it is necessary to use a detergent formulated especially for front-loading washers. train_2130.llm_answer: Statement1: The dean of computing must be respected by the academic staff and be competent to oversee the use of computers on campus. train_1423.llm_answer: Statement1: Consumer advocate: ephedra is a naturally occurring compound that some people use as a weight-loss aid. train_594.llm_answer: Statement1: Often patients with ankle fractures that are stable, and thus do not require surgery, are given follow-up x-rays because their general practitioners are concerned about possibly having misjudged the stability of the fracture. Statement2: When a number of follow-up x-rays were reviewed, however, all the fractures that had initially been judged stable were found to have healed correctly. train_594.llm_explanation: By changing "orthopedists" to "general practitioners" in Statement1, it sets up the context for Premise2, which indicates that general practitioners are less reliable in judging stability. Meanwhile, Premise1 loses its strength since it no longer emphasizes the credibility of the assessments involved.

train_3979.llm_answer: Statement1: More and more law firms specializing in corporate taxes are paid on a contingency-fee basis. train_4104.llm_answer: Statement1: It is popularly believed that a poem has whatever meaning is assigned to it by the reader. Statement2: But objective evaluation of poetry is possible only if at least two readers can agree on a universally accepted interpretation of the poem; for the aesthetic value of a poem cannot be discussed unless this agreement exists.
train_4104.llm_explanation: In the modified argument, Premise 2 is necessary as it explicitly connects the agreement of two readers to the possibility of an objective evaluation of the poem. train_1182.llm_answer: Critic : rock music is musically bankrupt and socially destructive, but at least the album covers of rock lps from the 1960s and 1970s often featured innovative visual art. Statement2: But now, since the production of lps has almost ended, rock music has nothing going for it.

train_2941.llm_answer: Statement1: Music critic: fewer and fewer musicians are studying classical music, decreasing the likelihood that those with real aptitude for such music will be performing it. train_939.llm_answer: Statement1: Twelve years ago and again five years ago, there were extended periods when the darfir republic's currency, the pundra, was weak: its value was unusually low relative to the world's most stable currencies. train_1248.llm_answer: Statement1: Educator: some experimental educational programs, based on the principle that children's first education should take place at home, instruct parents in how to be their child's "first teacher." train_4022.llm_answer: Super express shipping company has implemented a new distribution system that can get almost every package to its destination the day after it is sent. The company plans to encourage sales of its next-day service by intentionally delaying delivery of its two-day packages so that they will not be delivered the following day, even if the package arrives at its destination city in time for next-day delivery. However, customers are generally unwilling to pay for the overnight service because it is perceived as too expensive.

train_2437.llm_answer: The photographs that the store developed were quite unsatisfactory. The customer claims to have handled the film incorrectly. Neither the film nor the camera was defective. train_2644.llm_answer: Statement1: Human intelligence is not possible without the ability to identify emotions. Statement2: A computer is something that can never identify its emotions, so for that reason alone a computer will never be able to display intelligence.

train_3914.llm_answer: Statement1: The miscarriage of justice in the barker case was due to the mistaken views held by some of the forensic scientists involved in the case, who misunderstood their role in the judicial process. train_390.llm_answer: Statement1: Tax reformer: the proposed tax reform legislation is being criticized by political groups on the right for being too vague and by political groups on the left for being too specific. train_168.llm_answer: If one wants to succeed, then one should act as though one were genuinely confident about one's abilities, regardless of whether one actually trusts one's skills. train_2814.llm_answer: Statement1: A company has developed a new sensing device that, according to the company's claims, detects weak, ultralow-frequency electromagnetic signals associated with a beating heart. train_2710.llm_answer: Statement1: Virginia and her brother William disagree over when their father was born: Virginia claims it was in 1935 and William claims it was in 1933. train_3939.llm_answer: Statement1: Human skin gives off an array of gaseous substances, including carbon dioxide and lactic acid, both of which attract mosquitoes. train_2815.llm_answer: Critic : people today place an especially high value on respect for others; yet, in their comedy acts, many of today's most popular comedians display blatant disrespect for others.
